title: AI skills service integration
goal: Make apps.ai.skills_service aggregate module-registered skills and trusted SKILL.md files.
requirements: Keep support for contracts/ai/skills and data/contracts/ai/skills.
Use strict skill id validation for both provider and file skills.
Return extended catalog metadata: id, name, description, source_code, object_types, required_tools and trigger_examples.
Load provider-backed skill body through provider.load_body().
Load file-backed skill body from SKILL.md only after id validation.
If a user context is available, filter provider-backed skills through is_available_for_user().
acceptance: Skill catalog endpoint returns module skills.
Skill load endpoint returns provider body.
Invalid ids and missing skills return safe not-found behavior.
